digest.en: A major Russian attack on Ukraine has killed four and wounded dozens. Ireland is demanding Israel pay for the demolition of a Palestinian school by settlers. Romania reported drone fragments damaged property during the overnight Russian attack on Ukraine.
digest.hi: अमेरिका और इस्राइल के हमले में ईरान के शरीर को नुकसान की खबर है। CIA और मोसाद ढूंढने में नाकाम रहे हैं। इस बीच, अमेरिका-ईरान वार्ता पर सस्पेंस कायम है और इस्लामाबाद में सख्त लॉकडाउन के कारण सड़कों पर सन्नाटा पसरा हुआ है।

articles.title: Major Russian attack on Ukraine kills four, wounds dozens
articles.summary: Russia launched a major attack on Ukraine, killing four and wounding dozens with drones and missiles. Russia has been launching smaller ⁠barrages of dozens of drones every night at Ukraine, interspersing them ‌with occasional large-scale attacks that use hundreds of drones and dozens of missiles.

articles.title: Ireland to demand Israel pay for settler demolition of Palestinian school
articles.summary: Ireland will demand Israel repay the cost of a demolished Palestinian school. Ireland will demand that Israeli authorities repay the cost of a school that was demolished by settlers. Ireland to demand Israel pay for settler demolition of Palestinian school.

articles.title: No clarity on U.S.-Iran talks as Islamabad stays under lockdown
articles.summary: Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister expressed hope for meaningful engagements between the US and Iran to promote regional peace and stability. Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Dar, in a social media post, expressed hope for "meaningful engagements" between the two warring parties to promote regional peace and stability.

articles.title: 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today, Commercial Flights Resume In Tehran
articles.summary: Commercial flights resumed in Tehran after talks. US-Iran War News Live Update:. 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today, Commercial Flights Resume In Tehran.

articles.title: Romania says drone fragments damage property during overnight Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: Romania's Defence Ministry condemned Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine, which damaged property with drone fragments, posing a new challenge to regional security. The Defence Ministry firmly condemns the irresponsible actions of the Russian Federation and emphasises that these represent ​a new challenge ‌to regional security and stability in the Black Sea area.

articles.title: US says two killed in boat strike as toll climbs over 180
articles.summary: The US military conducted a strike on a vessel, killing two, with a toll over 180. The military "conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations", the US Southern Command said.

articles.title: Ukraine sacks top commander after ‘starving’ soldiers’ rib-showing photos go viral
articles.summary: Ukraine sacked its top commander after photos of starving soldiers went viral. Ukraine sacks top commander after ‘starving’ soldiers’ rib-showing photos go viral.

articles.title: The 85-Year-Old Widow Snagged by Trump’s Immigration Crackdown
articles.summary: Marie-Thérèse Ross-Mahé, an 85-year-old French widow of a former G. I., was deported from the US under Trump's immigration crackdown. In her first interview since being deported, she recounted her experience in ICE detention.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister awaits U.S. delegation to Pakistan for peace talks
articles.summary: Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad for peace talks, awaiting a US delegation including Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Iran's Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday, as the White House confirmed Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel there Saturday to try to "move the ball forward towards a deal.".

articles.title: Capture of ships by US, Iran violates international law, shipping body says
articles.summary: The International Chamber of Shipping director said the US and Iran should release captured vessel crews, as their actions violate international law. US and Iran should immediately release crews of captured vessels, says International Chamber of Shipping director.

articles.title: US ‘punishment’ plan for allies deepens Europe rift; Nato says expulsion not possible
articles.summary: The US plans to punish its allies, deepening the rift with Europe. Nato says expulsion is not possible, but the move has sparked concern among member countries. US ‘punishment’ plan for allies deepens Europe rift; Nato says expulsion not possible.

articles.title: What is Nato and which countries are in it?
articles.summary: Nato is a military alliance formed in 1949, comprising 30 countries including the US, UK, and Canada. Its primary goal is to provide collective defense against potential security threats. What is Nato and which countries are in it?

articles.title: US Mistakenly Puts Australian Flags Near White House For King Charles' Visit
articles.summary: The US mistakenly displayed Australian flags near the White House ahead of King Charles' visit. Charles is the head of state for Australia, but the role is largely ceremonial. Charles is also the head of state for Australia, but the role is largely ceremonial.

articles.title: US, Iran To Hold 2nd Round Of Talks In Pakistan Today. What's On Agenda
articles.summary: Iran and the US will hold a second round of peace talks in Pakistan. The previous round occurred on April 11-12, amid a delicate ceasefire. The previous round of talks was held on April 11-12.

articles.title: Melania Trump Is Growing White House Honey Program With New Beehive
articles.summary: Melania Trump has expanded the White House honey program with a new beehive, funded by the Trust for the National Mall. The new hive aims to promote bee conservation and honey production on the White House grounds.

articles.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
articles.summary: Japan recruits bodybuilders and athletes to work in nursing homes due to staff shortages. Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes. The results are reshaping elder care.

articles.title: Iran's foreign minister arrives in Pakistan, Trump expects offer satisfying US demands
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Hossein Amir-Abdollahian arrived in Pakistan. The White House announced special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for talks. Iran says it has no plans to meet US officials, while the White House says special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan on Saturday (Apr 25) for talks.

articles.title: What’s happening on day 57 as Trump dispatches negotiating team?
articles.summary: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will travel to Pakistan for Iran peace talks, as Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad. The US negotiating team's visit aims to revive stalled talks.

articles.title: US military kills two more people in strike on alleged drug boat in Pacific
articles.summary: The US military killed two people in a strike on a boat in the eastern Pacific.

articles.title: US State Dept orders global warning about alleged AI thefts by DeepSeek, other Chinese firms
articles.summary: The US State Department issued a global warning about alleged AI thefts by Chinese firms. US State Dept orders global warning about alleged AI thefts by DeepSeek, other Chinese firms.

articles.title: UK position on Falklands will not change, No 10 says after leaked Pentagon memo
articles.summary: The UK reiterated its claim to the Falkland Islands after a leaked Pentagon memo suggested reassessing US support.

articles.title: US-इस्राइल के हमले में कितना हुआ शरीर को नुकसान; CIA-मोसाद ढूंढने में क्यों नाकाम?
articles.summary: अमेरिका और इस्राइल ने 28 फरवरी को ईरान पर हमला किया। ईरान के सुप्रीम लीडर अयातुल्ला अली खामेनेई सहित कई सैन्य अफसर मारे गए। 28 फरवरी को अमेरिका और इस्राइल की तरफ से ईरान पर हमला बोला गया था।

articles.summary: रूस के विदेश मंत्री सर्गेई ने कहा कि पश्चिम ने यूक्रेन की आड़ में रूस के खिलाफ युद्ध छेड़ा है. उन्होंने यूरोप पर भी निशाना साधा. 'यूक्रेन की आड़ में पश्चिम ने रूस के खिलाफ छेड़ा युद्ध', विदेश मंत्री सर्गेई ने यूरोप पर साधा निशाना।

articles.title: राघव चड्ढा और अन्य सांसदों ने अचानक छोड़ी आम आदमी पार्टी? 'आप' में चल क्या रहा है?
articles.summary: आम आदमी पार्टी के सांसद राघव चड्ढा और अन्य ने पार्टी छोड़ दी. इससे पहले पार्टी ने उन्हें महत्वपूर्ण पद और जगह दी थी, लेकिन लगता है कि वे केजरीवाल के साथ तालमेल नहीं बना पाए.

articles.title: भारत दौरे पर आ रहीं संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक, द्विपक्षीय बैठकों में होंगी
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा की अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक अगले हफ्ते भारत का दौरा करेंगी. इस दौरान वह द्विपक्षीय बैठकों में शामिल होंगी और भारतीय मंत्रियों से मुलाकात करेंगी. भारत दौरे पर आ रहीं संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासभा अध्यक्ष एनालेना बेयरबॉक, द्विपक्षीय बैठकों में होंगी।

articles.summary: व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा कि पश्चिम एशिया संघर्ष को समाप्त करने की समयसीमा 3-5 दिन की खबरें गलत हैं। व्हाइट हाउस ने कहा कि युद्ध तभी खत्म होगा जब अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप चाहेंगे।

articles.title: ईरान पर अमेरिका-इज़रायल हमलों का 54वां दिन: संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास, हमले जारी और कूटनीति
articles.summary: अमेरिका और इज़रायल के हमलों के 54वें दिन, ईरान में संघर्षविराम के बीच अविश्वास और हमले जारी हैं। कूटनीतिक प्रयास जारी हैं लेकिन स्थिति अनिश्चित बनी हुई है। ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव कम होने के संकेत नहीं मिल रहे हैं।
